name: voidcore-frontend
description: VOIDcore smart-terminal client. Built by Gradle into app/src/main/resources/static/.

scripts.build: npm run copy-fonts && esbuild src/main.ts --bundle --target=es2022 --format=esm --outfile=../resources/static/main.js --sourcemap --minify && cp index.html ../resources/static/index.html && cp src/theme.css ../resources/static/theme.css
scripts.build:dev: npm run copy-fonts && esbuild src/main.ts --bundle --target=es2022 --format=esm --outfile=../resources/static/main.js --sourcemap && cp index.html ../resources/static/index.html && cp src/theme.css ../resources/static/theme.css
